title: Martin, Žilina Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Martin, Žilina Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Martin is a city in Žilina Region with a population of 54,168. The cultural center of Slovakia, home to the Slovak National Museum and the Matica slovenská, surrounded by the Malá Fatra mountains with excellent hiking.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
